title: Hot Wheels Hoto Roto, 2025 Rod Series, 158/250 Diecast Car Model, Grey
features: COLLECTIBLE SERIES: Part of the Rod Squad series (10/10) and 2025 collection, numbered 158/250 in the Hot Wheels lineup
UNIQUE DESIGN: Features a striking grey-blue body with exposed chrome engine and distinctive hot rod styling
DETAILED FEATURES: Showcases a custom exposed engine setup, black wheels, and aggressive stance characteristic of hot rod designs
DIE-CAST CONSTRUCTION: Manufactured using quality die-cast materials for durability and authentic detail representation
DISPLAY READY: Comes in original Hot Wheels packaging, perfect for both play and collection display purposes
description: Product description Rev up your collection with this striking Hot Wheels Hoto Roto die-cast model car from the Rod Squad series. Part of the 2025 collection and numbered 158/250, this meticulously crafted vehicle showcases an impressive grey-blue finish complemented by sleek black wheels. The standout feature is its eye-catching exposed engine modification with chrome-finished superchargers, giving it an aggressive, high-performance appearance. This model perfectly captures the hot rod aesthetic with its modified body style and detailed chrome components. The Hoto Roto demonstrates Hot Wheels' commitment to creating unique and imaginative designs that appeal to both young enthusiasts and serious collectors alike. Whether displayed proudly on a shelf or used for imaginative play, this Rod Squad series addition brings authentic automotive excitement to any Hot Wheels collection. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under three years old
